code: import React,{useRef,useEffect}from"react";var useDocumentTitle=function useDocumentTitle(title){var retainOnUnmount=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:false;var defaultTitle=useRef(document.title).current;useEffect(function(){document.title=title;},[title]);useEffect(function(){return function(){if(!retainOnUnmount){document.title=defaultTitle;}};},[]);};export default useDocumentTitle;
